title: Volant
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Volant''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Class Modernization Program|carrier]] in the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]]. [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Bowman Gavin]], [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] commander of the New Republic Fifth Fleet, visited this carrier in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]]
